title: The Road Poneglyph
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on the road poneglyph within the Inside the Whale Tree storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So, this is finally it...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I wonder, is it really there...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Or isn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Alright! We're going to search for the rest of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: I'll just go and grab Sanji and come right back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And where exactly were you planning on searching?! The world is ginormous you simpleton!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: If you're planning on heading to "Whole cake Island" with pekoms, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're already on the right path!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: of the four "road Doneglyphs" in existence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There is only one for which the where- abouts are unknown!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: One of them is here, of course...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And the other two which are accounted for...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are in the possession of certain pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: pirates ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The yonko "Big Mom"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And yet another yonko, "hundred-beast Kaido"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So if those two yonko are carrying one red stone each...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Then that means...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Geeehahahh!!!!?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's simple!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All we gotta do is steal 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahh... all of a sudden, my vision... it's gone black...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Will you guys stop whining already!! We were gonna beat the shot out of 'em sooner or later anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This just means we'll be doing it sooner!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't just say it like it's so matter-of-fact! Up until now, I've simply been tuning out all your crazy talk because I as- summed we'd be crossing that bridge much, much later....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah! I'm gonna piss myself too!! Don't think I won't do it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But if you're serious about picking a fight with them now then... yup... I'm a tinkle away from pissing myself out of fear alone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's great an' all, but there's actually no need...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: To steal the actual Doneglyphs themselves, ya' hear?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Kinda like "Fish prints", there are copies of the poneglyphs floatin' around out there. Most people try to just gather those.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Who in their right mind would ever try to lug those big things around with 'em anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I see now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can just stealthily infilitate the yonko ships, and NAB those copies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That way, you can insidiously make it all the way to raftel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You'll arrive without a hitch... then bam! You're pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And what the hell are you so dissatisfied about, you stubborn son of a-!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: enough about that. What's really got me concerned is your safety,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nico Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Be a man"?! What's that supposed to mean?! Were talk- ing about starting armageden here!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: All the rascals 'round the world who're interested in the "Voidcentury" have been Ableto gather countless numbers of poneglyph copies, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: None of 'em had any hope of deciphering those things ...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: When the time comes, and you go about readin' those things...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All the "Big Names" from 'round the world will surely come to snatch you away, rascal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Snatch Robin away?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I don't mind one bit! After all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I've got strong, reliable friends who will always be there to protect me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey now, hey now~ "strong and reli- able"? You're gonna make me blush~! Don't you worry, I'll blow anything and everything away just for you--!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: even if you praise me and rely on me like that...! Hochaa! Hwachaa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I won't let any of you evildoers lay a single finger on Robin, mark my words!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And if they dare touch her, they should consider their lives, and money, forfeit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: GORONYANYA...! You're certainly a dependable bunch o' rascals, aren't ya?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: By the way, why is it that all of you are so knowledgeable about the pone- glyphs?

summary: The Road Poneglyph: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
